## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`uv run ruff check .`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`uv run ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`uv run mypy src/`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
